queries.question: Where is the insulin pen made?
queries.sql: Select name from Country join Medical_Device on Medical_Device.country_id = Country.id where device_name = 'Insulin Pen'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?country a :Country .
  ?medical_device a :MedicalDevices .
  ?medical_device p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?device_name_f) = STR("Insulin Pen"))
}

queries.question: Where is the insulin pen made?
queries.sql: Select company_name from Manufacturing_Company join Medical_Device on Medical_Device.Manufacturing_Company_id = Manufacturing_Company.id where device_name = 'Insulin Pen'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?company_name WHERE {
  ?manufacturing_company a :Manufacturing_Company .
  ?medical_device a :MedicalDevices .
  ?medical_device p:hasManufacturing_Company ?manufacturing_company .
  ?manufacturing_company p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?device_name_f) = STR("Insulin Pen"))
}

queries.question: What manufacturing company and country are the devices made?
queries.sql: Select device_name, name, company_name from Country join Medical_Device on Medical_Device.country_id = Country.id join Manufacturing_Company on Medical_Device.Manufacturing_Company_id = Manufacturing_Company.id  where device_name = 'Insulin Pen'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?device_name ?name ?company_name WHERE {
  ?country a :Country .
  ?medical_device a :MedicalDevices .
  ?medical_device p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?manufacturing_company a :Manufacturing_Company .
  ?medical_device p:hasManufacturing_Company ?manufacturing_company .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?manufacturing_company p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?device_name_f) = STR("Insulin Pen"))
}

queries.question: Show me the devices and where they are made.
queries.sql: Select device_name, name from Country join Medical_Device on Medical_Device.country_id = Country.id where device_name = 'Insulin Pen'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?device_name ?name WHERE {
  ?country a :Country .
  ?medical_device a :MedicalDevices .
  ?medical_device p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?medical_device p:device_name ?device_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?device_name_f) = STR("Insulin Pen"))
}
